title: SSTI to RCE (Jinja2)
description: Greetly concatenates your name into a Jinja2 template before rendering. Break out of the literal, escape to Python, and read /flag.txt.

hints.text: Confirm SSTI first: ?name={{7*7}} — if you get 'Hello 49!' you have execution inside Jinja.
From a Jinja context with no globals, walk MRO from any literal: {{ ''.__class__.__mro__[1].__subclasses__() }} — find os._wrap_close or subprocess.Popen and pipe through it.
